Disaster Movie (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $14,190,901Details
International Box Office $22,529,851
Worldwide Box Office $36,720,752
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $11,234,355
Total $11,234,355
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,836,973 (41.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.43 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:38.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,642 opening theaters/2,642 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $23,638,330

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 29th, 2008 (Wide) by Lionsgate
Video Release: January 6th, 2009 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for crude and sexual content throughout, language, drug references and comic violence
Running Time: 87 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Famously Bad, Prologue
Plot point: Disaster, Dream Sequence, Relationships Gone Wrong, Spoof
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Time period setting: Prehistoric Times
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lionsgate, Grosvenor Park, 3 In The Box Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
